status: FROZEN before the prospective split was generated. One development cycle, one prospective run.

temporal_provenance_contract.window: T = required_window(max_lag + MAX_HISTORY, period, settle_margin) -- sized to the WIDEST hypothesis the observer will TEST, not the lags it first measured
temporal_provenance_contract.sampling_start: t_lo = max(settle_margin, max_lag_tested). NOT a constant chosen in advance.
temporal_provenance_contract.index: _idx() REFUSES a negative index. numpy would return the far end of the array; that fabricated history retired the previous observer (D-067).
temporal_provenance_contract.assertion: every row's source samples are RE-READ from the exact episode and timestamp they claim and compared byte-for-byte. The PAIR is verified, not the output alone.

admissible_interventions.structure (ancestry, lags, dissociation): one-step source pulses at every phase
admissible_interventions.function (the manifold): sustained source regimes only: free running + constant clamps on source subsets
admissible_interventions.never: clamping a boundary TAP as though it were an independent source

planner: lazy version space over lag-window hypotheses; EXPLORE the regime predicted to reveal the most unseen source-history rows; then VALIDATE by predicting a regime never executed. A regime whose outcome is already known under the live hypothesis is not caution, it is expense.
ground_truth: PRIVILEGED and INTERVENTION-DERIVED (audit.py). A variable is causal if an admissible intervention on it changes the downstream distribution -- even if it is silent in baseline. The write-enable rail IS a cause; excluding it to match an expected source count is what the D-067 scorer did, and it is forbidden.

held_out_implementations.or3: OR built by De Morgan out of three inverters -- unseen function AND unseen micro-implementation
held_out_implementations.fsm_gate: a SECOND state machine: a toggle whose write-enable is gated by the register
held_out_implementations.lag8_dm: lag-8 taps (half the manifold unreachable) combined by a De Morgan OR -- partial manifold

failure_rule: One development cycle, one frozen prospective run. If it fails: preserve, retire, do not patch, classify, keep EXP-SC-01 BLOCKED, STOP building further observers, and produce a PROGRAMME-LEVEL SYNTHESIS of what is and is not identifiable before any new direction.
